conflicts.finding: Every captured portal object remains Proposal_Activated_Pending_Open_Voting after its recorded vote end.
conflicts.treatment: Preserve the portal value as source metadata; derive no result or implementation state from it.
required_artifacts: Timestamped official portal history or corrected proposal-state exports for PIP-1 through PIP-33.

conflicts.finding: The portal captures repeat the Solana sentinel value 11111111111111111111111111111111 across candidate wallet fields; it is not treated as a candidate identity.
conflicts.treatment: Preserve the captured value separately, set normalized wallet_public_key to null, and require an official candidate-to-wallet mapping.
required_artifacts: Official candidate-to-wallet mapping for PIP-25 and PIP-27.

conflicts.finding: The Council tracker reports milestone completion for four failed proposals that supplied no authorization.
conflicts.treatment: Preserve the attributed tracker value but set ledger implementation to NOT_APPLICABLE_NO_AUTHORIZATION.
required_artifacts: Corrected Council tracker rows or Council-authored explanation for the milestone values.

conflicts.finding: Council-reported passage exists, but the preserved portal captures contain no electionResults winner list.
conflicts.treatment: Retain aggregate ballots/PVP and unresolved winner identity; infer no officeholder or program winner.
required_artifacts: Official final ranked-choice result export identifying winners and candidate-level totals for PIP-11, PIP-25, and PIP-27.

conflicts.finding: The portal captures preserve only aggregate ranked-choice ballots and PVP, not candidate-level PVP.
conflicts.treatment: List captured candidates and set every candidate PVP field to null with MISSING_FROM_CAPTURE status.
required_artifacts: Official per-candidate ranked-choice result exports for all five election PIPs.

conflicts.finding: PIP-27 records five winners, six maximum choices, and thirteen candidates while the proposal text describes five winners.
conflicts.treatment: Preserve all captured values and do not normalize the maximum-choice field.
required_artifacts: Official PIP-27 ballot configuration and final STV tabulation export.

conflicts.finding: The semantic source labels PIP-33 as Ecosystem Fund, while the proposal identifies an extraordinary direct DAO Treasury measure and the Council tracker marks ecosystem_fund NO.
conflicts.treatment: Use DIRECT_DAO_TREASURY_MEASURE and retain the semantic label as a rejected conflict.

conflicts.finding: The Council tracker result is null, while completed portal PVP supports the repository-reviewed PASSED result.
conflicts.treatment: Preserve the tracker null and use the explicitly labeled repository editorial vote adjudication.
required_artifacts: Corrected Council tracker result or an official final result record linked to PIP-33.

conflicts.finding: Two displayed tranches sum to $469,513.52 versus the stated $469,513.53 total; displayed USDC portions sum to $352,135.14 versus the stated $352,135.15 aggregate.
conflicts.treatment: Preserve both one-cent discrepancies without silent correction.
required_artifacts: Author or Foundation correction identifying controlling PIP-33 payment amounts.

conflicts.finding: Council-reported payment values and PIP-33 authorization lack transaction-level on-chain evidence in the repository.
conflicts.treatment: Use COUNCIL_REPORTED only for attributed tracker values and MISSING_ONCHAIN_EVIDENCE for verification; never mark paid or verified.
required_artifacts: Transaction signatures, token-account addresses, mint/decimals metadata, block times, and proposal-to-transfer mapping.

conflicts.finding: PIP-1 mentions quorum but supplies no numeric threshold; the completed-binary YES-versus-NO rule is an owner-approved repository editorial adjudication.
conflicts.treatment: Label the adjudication as repository-editorial and never assert that it appears in PIP-1.
required_artifacts: Source-native numeric quorum rule, if one governed these historical votes.
